metadata.name: Argo CD
metadata.description: Helm values template for Argo CD with ingress, TLS, controller or repo-server sizing, Dex, Redis, and metrics toggles for homelab GitOps clusters.
metadata.guide:
## Overview
Helm chart values template for Argo CD.

This template gives you a practical starting point for a homelab or small-cluster Argo CD deployment with ingress, TLS, optional Dex, bundled Redis, and per-component metrics toggles.

## Prerequisites
- Install the Argo Helm repository and decide which namespace and release name you want to use before rendering this values file.
- If you enable ingress, prepare the hostname, ingress class, and any Traefik middlewares or certificate issuers first.
- If you disable bundled Redis, wire an external Redis or Redis HA deployment separately before rollout.

## Deploy
- Render `values.yaml`, review the public URL, ingress, and metrics settings, then install or update the release with `helm upgrade --install`.
- Wait for the `argocd-server`, `argocd-repo-server`, and `argocd-application-controller` pods to become ready.

## Post-Install
- Retrieve the initial admin password and log in once to rotate credentials and configure SSO or repository credentials.
- If you enable metrics, verify that your monitoring stack can scrape the enabled endpoints or ServiceMonitors.
- Create one non-critical application first so you validate repo access, sync permissions, and ingress routing before onboarding the rest of the cluster.

## References
- [Argo CD](https://argo-cd.readthedocs.io/)
- [Documentation](https://argo-cd.readthedocs.io/)
- [Helm Chart](https://github.com/argoproj/argo-helm/tree/main/charts/argo-cd)

## Next Steps
After installation, retrieve the initial admin password:
```bash
kubectl -n argocd get secret argocd-initial-admin-secret -o jsonpath='{.data.password}' | base64 -d
```

variables.name: public_url
variables.title: Public URL
variables.description: Public URL Argo CD should advertise to users and callbacks.

variables.name: server_insecure
variables.title: Server Insecure
variables.description: Let the ingress controller terminate TLS in front of `argocd-server`.

variables.name: ingress_enabled
variables.title: Ingress
variables.description: Expose Argo CD through a Kubernetes ingress.

variables.name: ingress_class_name
variables.title: Ingress Class
variables.description: IngressClass name used for the Argo CD server ingress.

variables.name: ingress_hostname
variables.title: Ingress Hostname
variables.description: Hostname used for the Argo CD ingress.

variables.name: ingress_path
variables.title: Ingress Path
variables.description: Path exposed by the Argo CD ingress.

variables.name: ingress_entrypoints
variables.title: Traefik Entrypoints
variables.description: Traefik entrypoints annotation for the ingress.

variables.name: ingress_middleware
variables.title: Traefik Middleware
variables.description: Optional Traefik middleware reference attached to the Argo CD ingress.

variables.name: ingress_tls_enabled
variables.title: Ingress TLS
variables.description: Enable TLS for the Argo CD ingress.

variables.name: ingress_tls_secret
variables.title: TLS Secret
variables.description: TLS secret name used when cert-manager is not managing the ingress certificate.

variables.name: ingress_cert_manager_enabled
variables.title: Cert-Manager
variables.description: Annotate the ingress for cert-manager certificate issuance.

variables.name: ingress_cluster_issuer
variables.title: ClusterIssuer
variables.description: ClusterIssuer used when cert-manager handles ingress certificates.

variables.name: controller_replicas
variables.title: Controller Replicas
variables.description: Number of Argo CD application controller replicas.

variables.name: repo_server_replicas
variables.title: Repo Server Replicas
variables.description: Number of Argo CD repo-server replicas.

variables.name: server_replicas
variables.title: Server Replicas
variables.description: Number of Argo CD API server replicas.

variables.name: dex_enabled
variables.title: Dex
variables.description: Deploy bundled Dex for SSO scenarios that still use the Argo CD Dex component.

variables.name: redis_enabled
variables.title: Bundled Redis
variables.description: Deploy bundled Redis. Disable only if you provide Redis separately.

variables.name: metrics_service_monitor_enabled
variables.title: ServiceMonitor
variables.description: Create ServiceMonitor resources for enabled component metrics.

variables.name: controller_metrics_enabled
variables.title: Controller Metrics
variables.description: Expose metrics from the application controller.

variables.name: repo_server_metrics_enabled
variables.title: Repo Server Metrics
variables.description: Expose metrics from the repo-server.

variables.name: server_metrics_enabled
variables.title: Server Metrics
variables.description: Expose metrics from the Argo CD API server.

variables.name: dex_metrics_enabled
variables.title: Dex Metrics
variables.description: Expose metrics from Dex when Dex is enabled.

variables.name: redis_metrics_enabled
variables.title: Redis Metrics
variables.description: Expose metrics from bundled Redis when Redis is enabled.
